description: Style NoteThis cap is great summer wear keeping to a bright colour palette and a simple style. Designed as a baseball cap it works well both on and off the field. You can also sport it as a fashion accessory with its trendy print. Product DetailsBlue checked baseball capStitched patchwork on the frontHas a brand logo at the back and an adjustable strapMaterial and CareBlended fabricMachine wash in cold water or hand wash separatelyDo not use softeners or bleachTumble dry on lowCool iron; Do not iron on designDo not dry clean
